query_name: 検証_TPマッチング_来店店舗数_来店差分
query_string:
with order_log as (
  select
    distinct
    customer_id
    , business_date
    , order_id
    , property_id
  from 
    _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail as t0
  where
    customer_id in (
      select distinct customer_id from _integration_datamart.cls_order_detail 
        where time >= td_time_parse('2022-12-01', 'jst') and time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
    )
    and
    t0.time >= td_time_parse('2024-12-01', 'jst')
    and t0.time <= td_time_parse('2025-12-01', 'jst')
)

, agg_order_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , property_id
    , count(distinct order_id) as order_count
    , max(business_date) as latest_business_date
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1,2
)

, agg_property_count as (
  select
    customer_id
    , count(distinct property_id) as property_count
  from
    order_log
  group by
    1
)

, agg_order_rn as (
  select
    t0.*
    , t1.property_count
    , row_number() over (partition by t0.customer_id order by order_count desc, latest_business_date desc) as order_count_rn
    , max_by(property_id, latest_business_date) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as latest_property_id
    , min(t0.order_count) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as min_order_count
    , max(t0.order_count) over (partition by t0.customer_id) as max_order_count
  from
    agg_order_count as t0
  left join
    agg_property_count as t1
    on t0.customer_id = t1.customer_id
)

, tmp as (
  select
    customer_id
    , property_count
    , sum(order_count) as total_order_count
    , max(order_count) - min(order_count) as shop_order_count_diff
  from
    agg_order_rn
  group by
    1,2
)

select
  total_order_count as "来店回数合計/年"
  , property_count as "来店店舗数/年"
  , shop_order_count_diff as "最頻来店店舗 - 最少来店店舗（来店回数差分）"
  , count(distinct customer_id) as "顧客数"
from
  tmp
group by
  1,2,3
order by
  1,2,3
